'''Somov Rit''' was a sparsely populated [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] with a native [[Human/Legends|Human]] population. During the [[New Sith Wars]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] scout [[Torr Snapit]] came to the planet seeking [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] recruits, but his only luck was with three young children: [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Rain]], [[Darovit|Tomcat]] and [[Hardin|Bug]]. Rain later helped rebuild the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Order as [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane's]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], Darth Zannah.

The natives of the planet went by nicknames due to fear of the legend of the [[swamp demon]]. It was not uncommon for someone to live their whole life without their friends and family being aware of their real name. [[Maslak plant]]s grew on Somov Rit, and the populace were largely seafaring, subsiding on roots and fish.

{{Planet-stub}}
